name: Souletin Basque (Zuberera)
notes: Souletin (Zuberera/Xiberotarra). Easternmost Basque dialect, spoken in Soule/Zuberoa (France). Most divergent variety. Unique features: front rounded vowel /y/ (⟨ü⟩, like French), fully functional aspirate /h/, aspirated stops [pʰ, tʰ, kʰ], distinctive verb morphology. French phonological influence.
